surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0A]/70 border-b border-white/10
surface_strategies.cards_marketing: Flat background #171717, 1px subtle border border-white/5, no shadow. Hover: border-[#0F5257]/50
surface_strategies.pricing_premium: Tracing Beam: Subtle glowing gradient line traveling around the container edge, using #0F5257 glow.
surface_strategies.buttons: Primary: bg-[#0F5257] text-white hover:bg-[#136970]. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:border-white/40 text-white.

motion.entrance: framer-motion initial opacity-0 y-4, animate opacity-100 y-0, stagger 0.1s

components.navigation: Sticky top, glassmorphism, logo + 4 links + CTA
components.hero_input: Dual module (Text / URL). bg-[#171717] border border-white/10 focus-within:border-[#0F5257] focus-within:ring-1 focus-within:ring-[#0F5257]/50. Generous padding p-4.
components.pricing_card: 4 columns. 'Sistema' plan highlighted with #0F5257 borders and subtle blur behind it.
components.dashboard_layout: Sidebar nav (250px) + Main content area. Dark minimalist.

images.description: Dark graphite architectural abstract for subtle hero or section background. Use with heavy black/opacity overlay (bg-black/80).
Abstract blue wavy background to use inside the 'Qué recibes' or Blueprint cards as a subtle image layer.
Abstract geometric shapes for the opportunities module or general placeholder imagery.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme: Background #0A0A0A, Surfaces #171717. Do not use white backgrounds anywhere.
Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' for all headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Install these fonts via Google Fonts or standard imports.
The primary accent color is #0F5257 (Deep Teal / Petroleum). Use it sparingly for primary buttons, active states, and subtle glows. Avoid bright neon teals like #1B93A4.
Implement the Dual Input Module in the hero: A sleek dark container with tabs for 'Texto' and 'URL', and a large textarea/input field. It must look premium and inviting.
For Marketing sections (How it works, Benefits, 4 Routes), use Bento Grid (Tetris Mode) with generous spacing (gap-8 to gap-12).
For the Dashboard, use a 'Control Room' dense layout with a fixed sidebar. Cards should be flat #171717 with a subtle 1px border (#262626).
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states (e.g., border color shift to white/20 or #0F5257).
Pricing must show 4 plans: Gratis, Blueprint (€29), Sistema (€79), Premium (€199). Highlight 'Sistema' or 'Premium' using the Tracing Beam or subtle glow effect.
Install @phosphor-icons/react for icons. Use duotone or thin weights for a premium tech look.
All components must use pure Tailwind CSS for structural flexibility on marketing pages. Build custom layouts rather than rigid library templates.
Use Shadcn strictly for Dashboard interactive elements (Tables, Modals) with heavy customized dark styles.
Ensure the hero background image has a very strong overlay (e.g., bg-black/80) so it provides texture without interfering with the off-white text.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive and key informational elements.
